subcodes.first_line: In this day the effulgent rays of the Sun of Truth shine forth through the blessed Divine Lote-Tree in this Most Exalted Word [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز اشراقات انوار آفتاب حقیقت از خلال سدره مبارکه بهیات این کلمه علیا بر
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation of the Cause (general or uncategorized), @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
